scripts.start: concurrently -n "FLASK-R,FLASK-V2,FRONT-S,FRONT-G,INT-AI,RES-B,ST-BK,ST-FT" -c "bgBlue,bgBlueBright,bgGreen,bgGreenBright,bgMagenta,bgCyan,bgYellow,bgRed" "cd flask_backend && .\venv\Scripts\python run.py" "cd backend/skill_gap/flask_backend_v2/flask_backend_v2 && .\venv\Scripts\python run.py" "cd frontend/skillmap-ai && npm run dev" "cd backend/skill_gap/skillgap_frontend/skillgap_frontend && npm run dev" "cd ai-interviewer && .\venv\Scripts\python app.py" "cd resume_builder && .\venv\Scripts\python app.py" "cd student-portal/backend && node server.js" "cd student-portal/frontend && python -m http.server 5500"
